heading: Additional unlawful acts
label: 2722 Additional unlawful acts
notes: Effective DateSection effective on the date that is 3 years after , with provisions relating to release of personal information before the effective date and compliance after such date, see , set out as a note under .Sept. 13, 1994section 300003 of Pub. L. 103–322section 2721 of this title

children.heading: .—Procurement for Unlawful Purpose
children.label: a .—Procurement for Unlawful Purpose
children.text: It shall be unlawful for any person knowingly to obtain or disclose personal information, from a motor vehicle record, for any use not permitted under .section 2721(b) of this title

children.heading: .—False Representation
children.label: b .—False Representation
children.text: It shall be unlawful for any person to make false representation to obtain any personal information from an individual’s motor vehicle record.
